2026-03-18T07:42:00.0999577Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1000635Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1001157Z 
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1001467Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1002196Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1002634Z 
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1002795Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1003080Z

2026-03-18T07:42:00.1003505Z 
2026-03-18T07:42:00.1003635Z   git switch -
